summary: Full end-to-end retest after demo cleanup + Members Directory feature. 16/16 backend pytest cases pass. All frontend pages load, render real data only, no placeholders. Directory registration with photo, without photo, and search filter all work end-to-end.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI '@app.on_event("startup"|"shutdown")' API. Consider migrating to lifespan context manager (non-blocking for now, only a deprecation warning).

Directory photo upload silently swallows storage errors (only logs). User still gets 200 with no photo flag indication. Consider returning a warning field when upload fails so UI can show a soft notice.

register_directory does not validate email format / phone format / file size or MIME type. Recommend adding basic Pydantic-style validation and max upload size guard to prevent abuse on public endpoint.
GET /api/directory is unpaginated (limit 1000). Acceptable for now; add pagination when list grows.
seed_data_creation: Created 4 directory entries during testing (2 from backend tests TEST_Member_*, 2 from UI tests UI_With_Photo_* / UI_No_Photo_*). These can be left or cleaned by main agent.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests rewritten for cleaned data state (committee=2, newsletters=1 June 2026, events/notices/gallery/announcements empty). Directory endpoints fully tested: register with photo (multipart), register without photo, list, photo retrieval, 404 for no-photo member, 422 missing required. UI verified: Directory page form submits, success state appears, list updates, search filters by name/firm/membership; navbar+footer link to /directory; committee shows only Dhruval+Ashish with phones; contact has both phones and no map placeholder; newsletter shows June 2026 with working PDF links; home shows stats + newsletter banner + quick-access (no empty demo grids). No placeholder tokens detected on any page.
verified_flows: GET /api/committee returns 2 real members with phones
GET /api/directory lists new members with has_photo flag
GET /api/directory/photo/{id} returns image/* for member with photo, 404 otherwise
UI: Directory form -> success state -> member appears in Listed Members; search filters by name, firm, membership_no
UI: With-photo member uses /api/directory/photo/<id>; without-photo uses ui-avatars.com fallback
UI: Navbar 'Directory' link routes to /directory; Footer has 'Members Directory' link and both real phone numbers
UI: Newsletter page Read/Download/Read Now all point to the June 2026 PDF
